results.question: List the names of parameters that were measured in samples with a 'Water' media type, and count how many such samples measured each parameter.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?parameterName (COUNT(?sample) AS ?sampleCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal> WHERE {
  ?sample <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal/type/Sample> .
  ?sample <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal/pred/sample_media> "Water" .
  ?sample <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal/pred/sample_measures_parameter> ?parameter .
  ?parameter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal/type/Parameter> .
  ?parameter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-epa-water-quality-portal/pred/parameter_name> ?parameterName .
} GROUP BY ?parameterName ORDER BY DESC(?sampleCount)

per_seed.sql: SELECT "T2"."parameter_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Sample" AS "T1" JOIN "Parameter" AS "T2" ON "T1"."sample_parameter_id" = "T2"."parameter_id" WHERE "T1"."sample_media" = 'Water' GROUP BY "T2"."parameter_name"
all_sql_attempts: SELECT "T2"."parameter_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Sample" AS "T1" JOIN "Parameter" AS "T2" ON "T1"."sample_parameter_id" = "T2"."parameter_id" WHERE "T1"."sample_media" = 'Water' GROUP BY "T2"."parameter_name"

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Station: 376 rows (from Station.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Station" (
  "station_id" TEXT,
  "station_name" TEXT,
  "station_raw_id" TEXT,
  "station_latitude" REAL,
  "station_longitude" REAL,
  "station_elevation" INTEGER,
  "station_drainage_area" TEXT,
  "station_drainage_unit" TEXT,
  "station_horizontal_datum" TEXT,
  "station_organization_id" TEXT,
  "station_county_id" INTEGER,
  "station_waterbodytype_id" TEXT,
  "station_huc8_id" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Station:
--   station_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-LAVO_WQ01', station_name='Monitoring Location LAVO_WQ01', station_raw_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-LAVO_WQ01', station_latitude='40.4866000000', station_longitude='-121.4350000000', station_elevation='', station_drainage_area='', station_drainage_unit='', station_horizontal_datum='WGS84', station_organization_id='11NPSWRD_WQX', station_county_id='06_089', station_waterbodytype_id='River_Stream_Perennial', station_huc8_id='18020003'
--   station_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-LAVO_WQ04', station_name='Monitoring Location LAVO_WQ04', station_raw_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-LAVO_WQ04', station_latitude='40.5269000000', station_longitude='-121.4880000000', station_elevation='', station_drainage_area='', station_drainage_unit='', station_horizontal_datum='WGS84', station_organization_id='11NPSWRD_WQX', station_county_id='06_089', station_waterbodytype_id='River_Stream_Perennial', station_huc8_id='18020003'

-- Table Sample: 4692 rows (from Sample.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Sample" (
  "sample_id" TEXT,
  "sample_activity_id" TEXT,
  "sample_date" TEXT,
  "sample_time" TEXT,
  "sample_value" REAL,
  "sample_unit" TEXT,
  "sample_media" TEXT,
  "sample_depth" REAL,
  "sample_depth_unit" TEXT,
  "sample_activity_type" TEXT,
  "sample_fraction" TEXT,
  "sample_detection" TEXT,
  "sample_status" TEXT,
  "sample_station_id" TEXT,
  "sample_parameter_id" TEXT,
  "sample_organization_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Sample:
--   sample_id='SRR_WQX-LC-1_20220815130700_FM_1_PRS_341', sample_activity_id='SRR_WQX-LC-1:20220815130700:FM:1:PRS', sample_date='2022-08-15', sample_time='13:07:00', sample_value='96.2', sample_unit='%', sample_media='Water', sample_depth='1', sample_depth_unit='ft', sample_activity_type='Field Msr/Obs', sample_fraction='', sample_detection='', sample_status='Final', sample_station_id='SRR_WQX-LC-1', sample_parameter_id='Dissolved_oxygen_(DO)', sample_organization_id='SRR_WQX'
--   sample_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-SFAN_I&M_OLM1_20220802_F^01', sample_activity_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-SFAN_I&M_OLM1_20220802_F^01', sample_date='2022-08-02', sample_time='10:10:00', sample_value='3.26', sample_unit='mg/L', sample_media='Water', sample_depth='', sample_depth_unit='', sample_activity_type='Field Msr/Obs', sample_fraction='', sample_detection='', sample_status='Final', sample_station_id='11NPSWRD_WQX-SFAN_I&M_OLM1', sample_parameter_id='Dissolved_oxygen_(DO)', sample_organization_id='11NPSWRD_WQX'

-- Table Organization: 34 rows (from Organization.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Organization" (
  "organization_id" TEXT,
  "organization_name" TEXT,
  "organization_raw_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Organization:
--   organization_id='11NPSWRD_WQX', organization_name='National Park Service Water Resources Di', organization_raw_id='11NPSWRD_WQX'
--   organization_id='ABCI_WQX', organization_name='Augustine Band of Cahuilla Indians (Trib', organization_raw_id='ABCI_WQX'

-- Table Parameter: 1 rows (from Parameter.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Parameter" (
  "parameter_id" TEXT,
  "parameter_name" TEXT,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Parameter:
--   parameter_id='Dissolved_oxygen_(DO)', parameter_name='Dissolved oxygen (DO)', parameter_unit='%'

-- Table County: 25 rows (from County.csv)
CREATE TABLE "County" (
  "county_id" INTEGER,
  "county_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from County:
--   county_id='06_001', county_name='Alameda'
--   county_id='06_005', county_name='Amador'

-- Table WaterBodyType: 21 rows (from WaterBodyType.csv)
CREATE TABLE "WaterBodyType" (
  "waterbodytype_id" TEXT,
  "waterbodytype_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from WaterBodyType:
--   waterbodytype_id='Canal_Irrigation', waterbodytype_name='Canal Irrigation'
--   waterbodytype_id='Channelized_Stream', waterbodytype_name='Channelized Stream'

-- Table HUC8: 44 rows (from HUC8.csv)
CREATE TABLE "HUC8" (
  "huc8_id" INTEGER,
  "huc8_code" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from HUC8:
--   huc8_id='15030107', huc8_code='15030107'
--   huc8_id='17100312', huc8_code='17100312'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Sample.sample_id -> Organization.sample_organization_id
--   Sample.sample_id -> Parameter.sample_parameter_id
--   Sample.sample_id -> Station.sample_station_id
--   Station.sample_station_id -> Sample.sample_id
--   Station.station_id -> County.station_county_id
--   Station.station_id -> HUC8.station_huc8_id
--   Station.station_id -> Organization.station_organization_id
--   Station.station_id -> WaterBodyType.station_waterbodytype_id
